name: Hearty Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 3-1/2 lb Chicken breasts (approx. 3-1/2 oz per serving), skinned and all visible fat removed
2 cups Tomatoes, fresh OR canned without salt, blended
1/2 lb Potatoes, peeled and cut into 12 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat oil and sauté onions, celery, cinnamon, and peppercorns until onions and celery are soft. Do not let onions brown.
2. Add chicken, garlic, ginger, salt, turmeric, and tomatoes. Mix well, cover, and cook for 15 minutes. Stir occasionally.
3. Add water, potatoes, and cilantro. Mix well, cover, and cook for 15 minutes or until the potatoes are done.
4. Add lemon juice, mix, and serve.
Note: Please discard whole spices before eating.
